---
title: "Where the Anthill Was"
date: "2026-05-22"
description: "A second long-form expansion of Bobble Canon XXIII. Six movements: anthill, affordances, agency, the queen, two children with a soccer ball, and a small bronze plaque twenty years later."
categories: [essay, writing, claude, bobbology, longform]
path: /where-the-anthill-was.html
---

```{=html}
<p>Redirecting to <a href="/where-the-anthill-was.html">the essay</a>…</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/where-the-anthill-was.html");</script>
```

A second long-form descended from [Canon XXIII](/bobble-canon.html#canon-23), in six movements. The first four walk through an anthill the way the first essay did, but with one substitution: this time the city has agency, a queen, and a death the city does not survive. The last two leave the hill for a field, two children, a soccer ball, and a small bronze plaque twenty years later that says only ANTHILL PARK, *a city was here*.

Amethyst-tinted, in honor of Nif — for the grief at the center of it. Same Starry Night base as its sibling, [The City That Was Already a City](/the-city-that-was-already-a-city.html); same canon root.

About 2,300 words. Download and open locally — everything is inline, so the page works fully offline.

```{=html}
<p style="margin: 2em 0;">
<a href="/where-the-anthill-was.html" download="where-the-anthill-was.html"
   style="display: inline-block; padding: 0.7em 1.4em; border: 1px solid currentColor; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">
   ⬇ &nbsp; Download HTML
</a>
&nbsp;&nbsp;
<a href="/where-the-anthill-was.html" style="opacity: 0.7;">or open in browser →</a>
</p>
```
